individual.label: Individual
individual.description: Services for citizens, residents, and people in their personal capacity

core_human_needs.label: Core human needs
core_human_needs.description: Things every person requires regardless of circumstance

societal_needs_supports.label: Societal needs & supports
societal_needs_supports.description: Collective goods and supports government provides for everyone's benefit

scenario_dependent.label: Scenario-dependent needs
scenario_dependent.description: Triggered by a specific situation or life circumstance

identity_credentials_access.label: Identity, credentials & government access
identity_credentials_access.description: Who you are, what you're qualified to do, and how you interact with government

business.label: Business
business.description: Services for businesses, employers, operators, and industry

core_business_needs.label: Core business needs
core_business_needs.description: Things every business deals with regardless of industry

regulatory_compliance.label: Regulatory & compliance
regulatory_compliance.description: Rules government imposes on business operations

industry_specific.label: Industry-specific
industry_specific.description: Needs shaped by the specific industry a business operates in

worker_employer.label: Worker ↔ Employer
worker_employer.description: Both parties co-participate in a regulated framework

consumer_regulated_provider.label: Consumer ↔ Regulated provider
consumer_regulated_provider.description: Citizen accesses service; provider is regulated and accountable

complainant_regulated_party.label: Complainant ↔ Regulated party
complainant_regulated_party.description: Citizen files complaint; business faces investigation or enforcement

shared_infrastructure.label: Shared infrastructure
shared_infrastructure.description: Same system serves both audiences independently

shared_information.label: Shared information
shared_information.description: Government publishes; both audiences use for different purposes

universal_regulation.label: Universal regulation
universal_regulation.description: Same rules apply regardless of whether you are an individual or business
